strengths: 15+ years of full-stack engineering across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Direct experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, and AWS matching the primary stack
Active AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at current role
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java experience is dated (robotic arms work ~2016-2018)
No mention of PostgreSQL or Playwright among listed databases and testing tools
response.justification: The candidate brings over a decade of polyglot full-stack experience with a strong match on TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and cloud/containerization, plus current hands-on work in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling that directly aligns with the role's internal automation focus. Gaps exist around explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and current Kotlin experience, but the breadth of languages and demonstrated craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) suggest these are readily learnable in context.
